items.title: The Denver Nuggets have tendered qualifying offers to Spencer Jones and Peyton Watson, a league source told @spotrac.com
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Denver Nuggets have tendered qualifying offers to Spencer Jones and Peyton Watson, a league source told @spotrac.com 

Both Jones and Watson will now be restricted free agents this offseason.

items.title: The Denver #Nuggets have a ton of explaining to do if their ostensibly inexplicable move out of the first round doesn't A) lay the pathway for retaining Peyton Watson, and B) facilitate building a stronger contender around Nikola Jokic.
items.author: Joel Rush
items.body_excerpt:
The Denver #Nuggets have a ton of explaining to do if their ostensibly inexplicable move out of the first round doesn't A) lay the pathway for retaining Peyton Watson, and B) facilitate building a stronger contender around Nikola Jokic.

But at face value, without further moves, it's indefensible.

items.title: Bill Simmons on the Nuggets: “Why do they have to trade anybody to sign Peyton Watson? You have Jokic in your team, pay everyone, F*** off. Kroenke has a gazillion dollars, just keep everybody AND pay Peyton Watson. Your owner is super rich what are we doing?”
